news.summary: During their recent meeting, President Trump lavished Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni of Italy with compliments. Meloni mentioned that Trump has graciously agreed to visit Rome in the near future.
news.headline: Meloni and Trump strengthen bond in Oval Office. Trump praised Italian PM Meloni and accepted Rome invite.

news.summary: Atlanta Braves Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BATRA, BATRK) will hold a conference call on May 12th at 10:00 a.m. E.T. to review their first-quarter 2025 results. Prior to market opening, they will release a press statement detailing the results at https://www.bravesholdings.com/news/press-releases. The call and release will cover discussions on the financial performance and future prospects of the company.
news.headline: Atlanta Braves Holdings to host conference call on May 12th at 10:00 a.m. E.T to discuss Q1 2025 earnings. Visit https://www.bravesholdings.com/news/press-releases for details.

news.summary: Spanaway, Washington - KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has introduced Rolling Brook, a new housing development featuring one- and two-story homes in Spanaway. The community offers modern living options tailored to current lifestyles, including kitchens that open into spacious great rooms, large bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage areas. Rolling Brook promises innovative floor plans designed to enhance comfort and functionality. With the grand opening announcement, KB Home continues its reputation as a top U.S. homebuilder.
news.headline: KB Home's newest community, Rolling Brook in Spanaway, WA, offers one- and two-story homes with modern features.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency mogul Justin Sun has declared that he will not sell his Ethereum holdings despite its decreasing value. Sun, the founder of the Tron blockchain, expressed his confidence in Ethereum and announced plans to collaborate with more Ethereum developers. Sun's portfolio is valued at over $994 million, and he currently holds 203.175 ETH worth $322,510. He emphasized his commitment to the industry and building partnerships. Sun's decision is significant in the crypto world, given his influential status as a major investor.
news.headline: Crypto mogul Justin Sun vows not to sell his 203.175 ETH holdings worth $322,510 despite a 52% YTD slump. Tron will keep collaborating with Ethereum.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, DataVisor, a prominent provider of AI-based solutions for fraud and financial crime prevention, has achieved the title of Leader in The Forrester Wave™ evaluation of Anti-Money-Laundering Solutions, Q2 2025. This recognition is the highest designation in the report, indicating their exceptional performance. DataVisor received the highest possible scores in nine key criteria as assessed by Forrester, a distinguished independent research and advisory firm known for offering unbiased insights to assist organizations in making well-informed technology choices.
news.headline: DataVisor named Leader in Forrester report on AML Solutions with highest scores in nine criteria. #FraudPrevention #AI

news.summary: Vacasa, Inc., a top vacation rental management platform in North America, headquartered in Portland, Oregon, revealed that the Special Committee of its Board of Directors has evaluated the unsolicited acquisition proposal by Davidson Kempner Capital Management LP. The Special Committee unanimously decided that the revised proposal does not qualify as a "Superior Proposal." Vacasa trades on Nasdaq under the symbol VCSA.
news.headline: Vacasa rejects unsolicited proposal from Davidson Kempner Capital Management, deemed not likely to be superior.

news.summary: A recent survey revealed that approximately 44% of pet owners in Michigan chose to forgo or postpone veterinary appointments over the last year because of increasing costs. Lovet inaugurated its inaugural Grand Rapids hospital with a unique ribbon-chewing ceremony, led by a four-legged patient. The ceremony took place on April 18, 2025, in Grand Rapids, Michigan.
news.headline: Lovet Pet Health Care opens in Michigan to address rising vet costs. 44% Michigan pet parents delayed visits. GRAND RAPIDS, new hospital opens.

The launch took place in Irvine, California, with the aim of offering consumers a unique and interactive experience when designing their ideal vehicle.

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDGL), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in innovative treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 1, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets open. The company's focus on developing new therapeutics for MASH suggests its dedication to addressing this condition. This announcement denotes a significant update for investors and industry observers anticipating insights into Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc.'s financial standing and progress in combating metabolic disorders.
news.headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: MDGL) will release Q1 2025 results on May 1, targeting metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 1.4% from the previous quarter. This uptick in unemployment affected a total of 1.8 million individuals, with the majority being young adults between the ages of 18-24. The report also highlighted a concerning trend of job losses in the retail and hospitality sectors, with a combined total of 450,000 jobs lost in these industries. Furthermore, the data indicated that the average income for workers decreased by 2.5% compared to the previous year. The government has expressed plans to address this issue through various employment stimulus programs in the coming months.
news.headline: Jushi Holdings Inc. expands retail presence in Ohio with the grand opening of Beyond Hello™ Mansfield store.

news.summary: In Caledonia, Wisconsin, as of April 18, 2025, Central Storage & Warehouse (CSW), a leading Midwest cold storage developer and operator, has completed its third warehouse expansion. This expansion has added 15,000 new frozen pallet positions to accommodate the growth of essential operations.

news.summary: Preliminary pilot data indicates a boost in predictive efficacy for thin, inactive credit reports, leading to a more defined risk distinction between candidates with higher and lower scores. Individuals previously denied credit may now have a chance for approval upon reassessment. This development was shared in Washington and San Francisco on April 18, 2025.
news.headline: Credit Builders Alliance and VantageScore expand pilot program with 10 new participants, showing improved predictive lift for thin credit files. Previously declined applicants may benefit from reconsideration. Washington and San Francisco, April 18, 2025.

news.headline: Akeso's ebdarokimab approved in China by NMPA for plaque psoriasis treatment. (100)

news.summary: The American Small Business Chamber of Commerce has issued a warning regarding an Executive Order that they believe could potentially lead to the erosion of small business contracting regulations that have been in place for over 70 years. The Chamber has expressed concerns that this move could have significant implications for federal suppliers, who are predominately small businesses. This development was unveiled in Washington on April 18, 2025. The American Small Business Chamber of Commerce, known as ASBCC, is recognized as the primary advocate for small businesses that supply to the federal government.
news.headline: American Small Business Chamber of Commerce criticizes Executive Order on Federal Procurement, fearing it could dismantle 70 years of small business contracting law.

news.summary: A conference titled "AI for Communicators: Creating A Roadmap For AI-Driven Communication, Enhancing Workflow Efficiency, and Leading Organizational Transformation" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This event aims to delve into the realm of AI-powered communication, showcasing how innovation, efficiency, and collaboration can revolutionize work processes. Participants are encouraged to explore the vast potential AI holds in reshaping an organization's communication strategies. Join this conference to stay at the forefront of technological advancements and drive organizational change.
news.headline: AI for Communicators Conference in San Francisco on June 3-5, 2025 - focuses on AI-driven communication and organizational transformation.

news.summary: Astar Network, a blockchain firm, announced changes to its tokenomics on April 18 to reduce inflationary pressures. The base staking rewards were decreased from 25% to 10% to stabilize the annual percentage rate (APR). The aim is to maintain rewards significance while curbing excessive inflation. The company's new inflation-control mechanisms include routing token emissions into TVL-based rewards and introducing a minimum token emission threshold of 2.5%. These adjustments have decreased annual inflation from 4.86% to 4.32% and total ASTR tokens emitted per block from 153.95 to 136.67. The token hit an all-time low of $0.02 on April 7, dropping 93.8% from its peak of $0.42 three years ago. In December 2024, it surged to $0.09 before declining steadily. These changes aim to enhance stability and value preservation for Astar Network users.
news.headline: Astar Network lowers staking rewards from 25% to 10% to control inflation, reducing total ASTR emissions by 11% annually. Token hits all-time low at $0.02 on April 7.

news.summary: Public health officials announced today that there has been a significant increase in COVID-19 cases in the city, with a total of 1,236 new confirmed cases in the past week alone. This brings the total number of cases in the city to 8,764, with 346 active cases currently being monitored. The spike in cases has prompted the city to implement stricter social distancing measures and increase testing capacity to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, there have been 23 new deaths reported in the past week, bringing the total number of fatalities in the city to 189.Officials are urging residents to continue following safety guidelines and precautions to protect themselves and others from COVID-19.
news.headline: Tech startups are rising, with 100+ hacker houses worldwide simulating a utopia for visionary innovators.

news.summary: FARO® Technologies, Inc. is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter that ended on March 31, 2025, before the market opens on Thursday, April 24, 2025. The company, known for its 4D digital reality solutions, will have its President and CEO, Peter Lau, along with the Senior VP and CFO, Matthew Horwath, host a conference call at 8:00 am ET on the same day. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing +1 800-245-3047 (U.S.) or +1 203-518-9765 (International) using the passcode FARO. To ensure a prompt connection, it is recommended to dial in 10 minutes prior to the scheduled start time. Furthermore, a live webcast of the call will be accessible on the Investor Relations section of FARO's website at: https://www.faro.com/about-faro/investor-relations/events
news.headline: FARO to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on April 24, 2025. Conference call with CEO and CFO at 8:00 am ET. Dial +1 800-245-3047 (U.S.) or +1 203-518-9765 (International) with passcode FARO for access. Live webcast on FARO's website.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established to enhance Keeper Security's Privileged Access Management (PAM) and password management services for various government agencies at federal, state, and local levels, as well as higher education institutions. This partnership aims to extend advanced cybersecurity protections to a wide range of entities. The collaboration was announced in Chicago on April 18, 2025. Keeper Security, known as a top cybersecurity provider specializing in zero-trust and zero-knowledge solutions, will now cater to these sectors, bolstering their defenses against cyber threats.
news.headline: Keeper Security partners with immixGroup to enhance security for public sector; focuses on federal, state, local government agencies and higher education institutions.
